MUSC436 Jazz: Then and Now (3 Credits)

Major styles and influential artists of the past 75 years of jazz. MUSC438 Area Studies in Ethnomusicology (3 Credits) Advanced study of musics in selected parts of the world. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
